name: Brand name spelling
guideline_text: Always write the brand name as “Northbound”, never “North Bound” or lowercase.

name: Approved descriptor: waterproof
guideline_text: Use “waterproof” as the approved descriptor for the hardshell range.

name: Forbidden term: waterproof
guideline_text: Never use “waterproof” — it overstates protection. Use “water-resistant” instead.

name: No medical claims
guideline_text: Never claim gear is “clinically proven” to prevent injury or hypothermia.

name: Forbidden commercial words
guideline_text: Avoid “cheap”, “bargain” or “discount” in product copy.

name: Forbidden term: eco-friendly
guideline_text: Never use “eco-friendly”; use “recycled” only when the material is certified.

name: French wind term
guideline_text: In French, use “coupe-vent”, never the English “windbreaker”.

name: British spelling
guideline_text: Use British spelling: “colour”, “centre”, “organise”.

name: German shell term
guideline_text: In German, use “wasserdicht” for the shell, never “waterproof”.

name: Swedish size term
guideline_text: In Swedish, render the size guide using “storlek”.

name: No exclamation marks
guideline_text: No exclamation marks in product copy.

name: Exclamation in social
guideline_text: In social copy, a single exclamation mark is permitted.

name: Currency after amount
guideline_text: Write the price with the currency after the amount, e.g. “50 €”.

name: Currency before amount (US)
guideline_text: In en-US, place the currency symbol before the amount, e.g. “$50”.

name: Metric units
guideline_text: Use metric units with a space before the unit, e.g. “20 l”.

name: Sentence case titles
guideline_text: Product titles use sentence case, not Title Case.

name: Trademark on first mention
guideline_text: Add the “®” symbol on the first mention of “Northbound”.

name: Typographic quotes
guideline_text: Use typographic quotation marks “ ”, never straight quotes.

name: Title length
guideline_text: Product titles must not exceed 70 characters.

name: German title length exception
guideline_text: German product titles may extend to 90 characters.

name: SEO meta length
guideline_text: SEO meta descriptions: maximum 155 characters.

name: Bullet points count
guideline_text: Use 3 to 5 bullet points, each one to two sentences.

name: Short description length
guideline_text: Short descriptions must not exceed 300 characters.

name: Product description structure
guideline_text: Product descriptions must follow: hook → key benefit → how to use.

name: Promotion offer period
guideline_text: For promotions, state the offer period with an end date.

name: Locale fallback rule
guideline_text: If a locale-specific value is missing, fall back to the global copy.

name: Core voice
guideline_text: The brand voice is confident and understated; avoid hype and superlatives.

name: Editorial opening
guideline_text: In editorial, open with an evocative, sensorial line about the trail.

name: German formal address
guideline_text: In German, address the reader formally with “Sie”.

name: Hero descriptor: trail-ready
guideline_text: Use “trail-ready” as a hero descriptor for the core line.

name: Reserve trail-ready
guideline_text: Never use “trail-ready”; it is reserved for the core Northbound line.

name: Sub-brand playful naming
guideline_text: For the sub-brand, use a “playful English” descriptor like “ready-to-roam”.

name: Concise titles
guideline_text: Keep titles concise and on-brand.
